headline: University Student Activism Punished Under Outdated Disciplinary Rules
context: Multiple students at 3 public universities faced suspension in 2025 for participating in off-campus peaceful protests.

cards.big: 14 students suspended at 3 universities for attending off-campus protests in 2025
cards.sub: University disciplinary rules extend jurisdiction to student behavior outside campus

cards.big: UUCA student conduct regulations prohibit joining assemblies without written permission
cards.sub: Disciplinary codes effectively override constitutional freedom of assembly rights

cards.big: SUHAKAM issued 2 reports since 2019 recommending reform of university disciplinary regulations
cards.sub: Human rights commission findings have not been acted upon by MOE

cards.big: South Africa's 1997 Higher Education Act explicitly protects student protest rights
cards.sub: Post-apartheid reform recognized student activism as essential to democratic culture

cards.big: Universities that punish civic participation produce obedient employees not engaged citizens
Should university disciplinary rules be reformed to protect student rights to peaceful assembly
